message:
🧹 Extract 43 magic numbers into named constants, ratchet to zero (#10245)

Replace all raw numeric literals flagged by the no-magic-numbers ratchet
test with semantically named UPPER_SNAKE_CASE constants. This covers
timer delays (5), style-prop values (3), and comparison thresholds (35)
across 28 card component files.

Ratchet baselines lowered: total 43→0, timer 5→0, style-prop 3→0,
comparison 35→0.

Fixes #10243

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
